idea-plugin.name: Claude Commit Message
idea-plugin.description:
Generates a Git commit message from your changes using Claude, right inside the commit dialog. It adds a button to the commit message toolbar (next to the AI Assistant button). On click, the plugin collects the diff of the files included in the commit and generates a commit message with Claude. By default it reuses your existing Claude Code (CLI) login (no API key required), but it also accepts an Anthropic API key. Configure it under Settings > Tools > Claude Commit Message.

Portugues: Gera a mensagem de commit a partir do diff usando a Claude, direto no dialogo de commit. Por padrao usa o login do Claude Code (CLI) ja feito no terminal (sem API key), mas tambem aceita uma API key da Anthropic.

Developed by Raphael Moral Piazera.

action.text: Gerar mensagem de commit com Claude
action.description: Gera a mensagem de commit a partir do diff usando a Claude
